description: <each>-element reactive list + count (§42 / §6.1). Two add-clicks append two items; the <each> renders two .row rows and #count (reading @items.length) reads 2. The <each>-element twin of each/for-lift-list.
rationale: §42 a reactive @items write re-renders the <each> rows AND any interpolation reading the collection (@items.length). Two appends -> two rows, count 2, nextId 3.
